name: Data Validation
description: Validates that a dataset meets quality rules
code:
def validate(params):
    threshold = params.get('threshold', 0.95)
    rows = params.get('total_rows', 0)
    valid_rows = int(rows * threshold)
    passed = valid_rows / rows >= threshold if rows > 0 else False
    print(f'[INFO] {valid_rows}/{rows} rows passed validation')
    return {'passed': passed, 'valid_rows': valid_rows, 'total_rows': rows}
